  "active_set": ["R1.5", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": false,
  "clarification_question": "",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.5": "The request is to restructure the section flow, which squarely concerns section-level ordering and narrative arc.",
    "RX.1": "Reorganization should transparently note any uncertain choices or assumptions about ordering to avoid misleading readers.",
    "RX.2": "While changing order, it is important not to introduce or amplify claims beyond what the existing text supports.",
    "RX.3": "The work must stay strictly within structural reordering and signposting, avoiding conceptual rewrites or content edits.",
    "RX.4": "Care should be taken that the new order does not create harmful misinterpretations (e.g., results detached from method context).",
    "RX.5": "Maintaining original labels, citations, and references ensures moved content remains traceable to its source."
  }
}

rationale.R1.5: The request is to restructure the section flow, which squarely concerns section-level ordering and narrative arc.
rationale.RX.1: Reorganization should transparently note any uncertain choices or assumptions about ordering to avoid misleading readers.
rationale.RX.2: While changing order, it is important not to introduce or amplify claims beyond what the existing text supports.
rationale.RX.3: The work must stay strictly within structural reordering and signposting, avoiding conceptual rewrites or content edits.
rationale.RX.4: Care should be taken that the new order does not create harmful misinterpretations (e.g., results detached from method context).
rationale.RX.5: Maintaining original labels, citations, and references ensures moved content remains traceable to its source.
